job.task: Generate comprehensive test scenarios for ReportEngine class

context.class_under_test: ReportEngine with transactions, mode strategy, and UI interface
context.test_categories: - Happy path scenarios (normal report generation flow) - Error conditions (empty transactions, invalid data) - Edge cases (single transaction, interrupted report) - Integration points (mode strategy, UI interface) - Performance scenarios (large transaction sets)

job.requirements: - Use pytest framework with fixtures - Include descriptive test names explaining what's being tested - Mock external dependencies (UI, file system) - Test both success and failure paths - Verify expected behaviors and error messages
